letter.heading: OPEN LETTER
letter.p1: Daiphong VN Industrial Joint Stock Company respectfully sends greetings and best wishes for health and success to your organization.
letter.p2: With experience in manufacturing and processing MEP products, Daiphong is a trusted partner in supplying ducts, grilles, dampers, cable trays, ladders and accessories.
letter.p3: Our products are widely applied in projects such as high-rise buildings, shopping centers, hospitals, schools, factories, workshops, industrial zones and many other civil and industrial projects nationwide.
letter.p4: With flexible production capacity, standard equipment and a professional technical team, Daiphong is committed to meeting requirements for quality, schedule and cost, bringing sustainable value to every project.
letter.p5: We look forward to becoming a reliable partner and accompanying our customers in current and future projects.
letter.closing: Sincerely thank you and wish your organization sustainable prosperity.

letter.heading: COMPANY INTRODUCTION
letter.lineTitleAlt: Decorative underline for company introduction heading
letter.p1: Daiphong is a pioneering unit in the field of manufacturing and processing professional MEP products. We specialize in providing comprehensive solutions for ducts, grilles, dampers, cable trays and related accessories for HVAC systems.
letter.p2: With modern production capacity and a professional technical team, we are committed to delivering products that meet the highest technical standards. All Daiphong products undergo strict quality inspection, ensuring durability, accuracy and optimal performance.
letter.p3: We are proud to be a trusted partner for many major projects nationwide, from high-rise buildings, shopping centers, hospitals, schools to factories, workshops and industrial parks. Each project is an opportunity for us to demonstrate our capabilities and quality commitment.
letter.p4: Daiphong continuously invests in modern machinery and equipment and applies advanced technology. We aim to automate and standardize the production process to ensure consistency and high quality in every product.
letter.ceoImageAlt: Mr. Le Thanh Tung - Chairman and CEO of Daiphong VN Industrial Joint Stock Company

vision.title: VISION
vision.description: Daiphong aims to become Vietnam's leading quality and trusted manufacturer and processor of ducts, grilles and HVAC accessories, providing safe, efficient and sustainable ventilation solutions for all MEP projects.

mission.title: MISSION
features: Daiphong carries the mission of creating a healthy living and working environment by providing high-quality ventilation solutions through ducts, grilles and HVAC accessories that meet technical standards – aesthetics – outstanding durability.

We continuously innovate technology, improve production capacity and perfect our services, to deliver accurate, safe, efficient and on-schedule products to contractors and investors in every MEP project.

coreValues.title: CORE VALUES
features: At Daiphong, we believe that duct quality is the foundation of clean air and sustainable living environment.
Each product is manufactured with high durability, absolute sealing and superior accuracy, ensuring the ventilation system operates safely, stably and energy efficiently in every project.
Not only creating products, Daiphong also creates comprehensive ventilation solutions, contributing to improving project quality – brand value – and the living experience of Vietnamese people.

philosophy.title: BUSINESS PHILOSOPHY
features: Quality is the foundation – Every product reflects Daiphong's commitment to the highest durability, sealing and accuracy.
Schedule is commitment – Accompanying project progress, ensuring credibility with customers and partners.
Integrity is the guiding principle – Maintaining trust and responsibility in every cooperation.
Continuous innovation – Applying modern technology, optimizing processes to improve production efficiency.
Sustainable development – Towards harmony between business, customer, employee and societal interests.

partner.heading: Featured Projects
partner.lineTitleAlt: Decorative underline for featured projects heading
partner.p1: Daiphong is proud to be a member of a vast strategic partner network, including leading corporations and enterprises in many fields. Sustainable cooperation with over 50 trusted partners has helped us expand our scope and improve our service delivery capabilities.
partner.p2: We particularly focus on building long-term partnership relationships based on core principles:
partner.p3: Through our diverse partner network, from banks, real estate corporations to technology and manufacturing companies, we can provide comprehensive integrated solutions for projects of all sizes.
partner.p4: Daiphong is committed to maintaining and developing partnerships with all current partners, while always welcoming new partners to create sustainable value and contribute positively to the development of Vietnam's MEP industry.

servicesPage.heading: BUSINESS FIELDS
servicesPage.lineTitleAlt: Decorative underline for business fields heading

ongGioTron.title: Round ducts
ongGioTron.description: Round ducts are manufactured from high-quality metal sheets with good durability and corrosion resistance. Products meet international standards, suitable for all ventilation systems.

ongGioVuong.title: Rectangular ducts
ongGioVuong.description: Rectangular ducts are manufactured with high precision, suitable for ventilation systems in confined spaces. Products have high aesthetics and are easy to integrate into architecture.

cuaGioCacLoai.title: Air outlets
cuaGioCacLoai.description: Air outlets are manufactured in a variety of designs, suitable for all ventilation systems. Products have high aesthetics, easy to adjust airflow and ensure optimal ventilation efficiency.

phuKienOngGio.title: Duct accessories
phuKienOngGio.description: Duct accessories are manufactured with high precision, ensuring tight connections and optimal ventilation efficiency. Products include elbows, tees, reducers, couplings and other accessories.

vanGio.title: Dampers
vanGio.description: Dampers are manufactured with high precision, ensuring accurate and efficient airflow control. Products include round and rectangular dampers, pressure relief dampers, fire dampers and other types.

projectsPage.heading: PROJECTS
projectsPage.description: Over the years, Daiphong is proud to have been trusted and chosen by many partners through the projects we have successfully implemented. Our customers span various industries.
